pathing: Mail carrier walks to porch, places package at door, turns and leaves. Direct purposeful movement.
history_brief: Mail and package deliveries are common at this time. Similar porch activity occurs daily.

pathing: Masked individual approaches back door, tests handle with crowbar. Focused on entry hardware.
history_brief: No benign routine at this hour. No prior maintenance or authorized access.

pathing: Person approaches door quietly at 2 AM, uses key, enters quickly. Furtive but no tools or forced entry.
history_brief: Teenager returning late is plausible. No prior intrusion pattern. Resident household.

pathing: Raccoon knocks over trash can. Casts human-sized shadow from streetlight. No bipedal gait or human form.
history_brief: Wildlife near trash occurs regularly. No person visible. Shadow artifact from angle.

pathing: Person with package at door at 3 AM. Erratic pacing, looks into windows. Delivery-like prop but suspicious behavior.
history_brief: No routine 3 AM deliveries. Context says threat; package suggests delivery; behavior suggests casing.
